examples.title: Lattice Property Checker
examples.description: Check if given poset is lattice by verifying all pairs have LUB/GLB
examples.code:
FUNCTION is_lattice(poset):
  FOR ALL a, b IN poset:
    IF NOT (has_lub(a,b) AND has_glb(a,b)):
      RETURN False
  RETURN True
examples.explanation: Brute-force verification by checking all element pairs
